data.content: Implementation review approved. All three requirements satisfied: (1) dispatchPreamble() correctly varies wrapper text by workflow step — review steps get review-oriented language, action steps get implementation-oriented language, threaded through initial dispatch, parent dispatch, and take-loop paths; (2) kno claim non-zero exit code guard added to all three prompt paths in knots-backend.ts (parent, parent-child, single-beat); (3) regression test in terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts exercises take-loop review preamble path — 8/8 tests pass, tsc clean, lint clean.
